title: Mira's Humming Heart
cover_prompt: A small, round-faced child with rosy cheeks curled up in a nest of blankets, eyes half-closed, while soft golden light glows around them like a heartbeat. The room is dim, with gentle shadows shaped like wings.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm, la la, hush now, dear
Mmm, the night is almost here
Shh, na na, close your eyes
Mmm, the dark is soft surprise

[verse]
La la, shh, the wind is low
Mmm, just feel the gentle glow
Na na, hmm, the world is small
Mmm, and safe inside it all

[verse]
Shh, la la
Mmm
style_prompt: Solo female vocal lullaby, humming only, no instruments, no melody variation, sustained warm tones, 58 BPM, extremely intimate, breathy, mouth-closed humming, monotone drone, like breathing set to pitch, meditative, hypnotic, no percussion, pure voice

character.name: Mira
character.identity: A little girl who hums the world to sleep with her steady, warm heartbeat song.
character.special: Her voice carries the rhythm of safety, wrapping every worry in a quiet, loving hum.

about: A soothing humming lullaby that mimics the steady rhythm of a heartbeat, helping little ones sync their breathing to the sound. The gentle, wordless melody eases anxiety by creating a sense of warmth and closeness, guiding restless minds into peaceful sleep.
